title: Xeron
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Xeron-TEA.jpg]] |name=Xeron |region=*[[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Xeron system/Legends|Xeron system]] *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] |sector= |system=[[Xeron system/Legends|Xeron system]] |coordinates=M-14 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial[[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Here's what you've been sent to see, Commander."
"The new model warbot the Empire threw at your ground troops on Xeron...!|A Rebel trooper and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} '''Xeron''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xeron system/Legends|Xeron system]], a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. Xeron was the site of a [[Battle of Xeron|battle]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] circa [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], where the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] attacked Rebel ground troops with a new [[Imperial warbot|warbot]] to devastating effect. ==Behind the scenes== Xeron was first mentioned in [[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1981]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Xeron [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Xeron itself, in grid square M-14. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Xeron}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 47}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Xeron }} [[Category:Planets in the Inner Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
